name: Ogre Zombie
languages: Understands Common and Giant but can't speak

features.name: Undead Fortitude
features.description: If damage reduces the zombie to 0 Hit Points, it makes a Constitution saving throw (DC 5 plus the damage taken) unless the damage is Radiant or from a Critical Hit. On a successful save, the zombie drops to 1 Hit Point instead.

actions.name: Slam
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) Bludgeoning damage.

tactical_info.tactics: Uses size and strength to dominate melee. Undead fortitude combined with high HP makes it very durable. Perfect elite minion for necromancer encounters.
